2604.25914.title: DV-World: Benchmarking Data Visualization Agents in Real-World Scenarios
2604.25914.paper_summary: Real-world data visualization (DV) requires native environmental grounding, cross-platform evolution, and proactive intent alignment. Yet, existing benchmarks often suffer from code-sandbox confinement, single-language creation-only tasks, and assumption of perfect intent. To bridge these gaps, we introduce DV-World, a benchmark of 260 tasks designed to evaluate DV agents across real-world professional lifecycles. DV-World spans three domains: DV-Sheet for native spreadsheet manipulation including chart and dashboard creation as well as diagnostic repair; DV-Evolution for adapting and restructuring reference visual artifacts to fit new data across diverse programming paradigms and DV-Interact for proactive intent alignment with a user simulator that mimics real-world ambiguous requirements. Our hybrid evaluation framework integrates Table-value Alignment for numerical precision and MLLM-as-a-Judge with rubrics for semantic-visual assessment. Experiments reveal that state-of-the-art models achieve less than 50% overall performance, exposing critical deficits in handling the complex challenges of real-world data visualization. DV-World provides a realistic testbed to steer development toward the versatile expertise required in enterprise workflows. Our data and code are available at \href{https://github.com/DA-Open/DV-World}{this project page}.
2604.25914.paper_summary_zh: 真實世界的數據視覺化（DV）需要本地環境的基礎、跨平台的演變以及主動的意圖對齊。<lb/>然而，現有的基準往往受到代碼沙盒限制、單語言創建任務的影響，以及對完美意圖的假設。<lb/>為了彌補這些空白，我們推出了DV-World，一個設計用於評估DV代理在真實世界專業生命周期中的260個任務的基準。<lb/>DV-World涵蓋三個領域：DV-Sheet用於本地電子表格操作，包括圖表和儀表板的創建以及診斷修復；DV-Evolution用於調整和重構參考視覺工件，以適應不同編程範式下的新數據；以及DV-Interact用於主動意圖對齊，搭配模擬用戶的模擬器，模仿真實世界中模糊的需求。<lb/>我們的混合評估框架整合了表值對齊以實現數值精確性，並使用MLLM-as-a-Judge和評分標準進行語義視覺評估。<lb/>實驗顯示，最先進的模型整體表現低於50%，暴露出在處理真實世界數據視覺化的複雜挑戰方面的重大缺陷。<lb/>DV-World提供了一個現實的測試平台，以引導開發朝向在企業工作流程中所需的多元專業知識。<lb/>我們的數據和代碼可在\href{https://github.com/DA-Open/DV-World}{這個項目頁面}上獲得。
2604.25914.author: Jinxiang Meng et.al.
2604.25914.authors: Jinxiang Meng, Shaoping Huang, Fangyu Lei, Jingyu Guo, Haoxiang Liu, Jiahao Su, Sihan Wang, Yao Wang, Enrui Wang, Ye Yang, Hongze Chai, Jinming Lv, Anbang Yu, Huangjing Zhang, Yitong Zhang, Yiming Huang, Zeyao Ma, Shizhu He, Jun Zhao, Kang Liu
